description: Frontend verification eval set — 10 merged PRs across 3 open-source Next.js/React repos

repos.description: Open-source scheduling infrastructure — Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind
Open-source survey & feedback platform — Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind
repos.dev_setup: pnpm install && docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && pnpm dev

repos.description: Open-source DocuSign alternative — Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind

evals.title: fix: inconsistent hover width on My Account → Settings navigation
evals.notes: Visual layout fix — full-width hover state on vertical nav items

evals.title: fix: dropdown toggle indicator sync in workflow form
evals.notes: Interaction fix — chevron icon rotates to match open/closed dropdown state

evals.title: fix: hide bookings opt-in banner on mobile viewport
evals.notes: Responsive fix — fixed-position banner hidden below 768px

evals.title: feat: feedback records table
evals.notes: New page — paginated table of feedback records in Unify workspace

evals.title: feat: add Formbricks AI toggle to organization settings
evals.notes: Settings UI — AI toggle switch visible only to org owners

evals.title: feat(navigation): add workflows section to main navigation
evals.notes: Navigation — Workflows section added to sidebar

evals.title: fix: theme styling preview shows open text question
evals.notes: Theme preview — open text question visible alongside multiple choice

evals.title: fix: make signing page left-hand sidebar collapsible
evals.notes: Interaction — sidebar collapse/expand toggle; hidden on mobile

evals.title: fix: update button width to fit content in public profile page
evals.notes: Layout fix — template buttons use w-fit, no text overflow

evals.title: feat: per-recipient envelope expiration
evals.notes: Feature — expiration date field per recipient in send dialog
